name: Cut-Out Sugar Cookies (Macm)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the sugar and all ingredients except the 2 cups of flour; blend until smooth.
3. Stir in the remaining flour.
4. On a floured surface, knead dough about 20 times until smooth.
5. Roll out dough to 1/8-inch thickness.
6. Cut into desired shapes using cookie cutters.
7. Place cookies on lightly greased baking sheets.
8. Bake for 5-8 minutes or until edges are light golden brown.
9. Cool for 1 minute, then remove from the baking sheet.
10. Frost and decorate as desired. Makes about 2 dozen assorted size cookies.
